name: riscos-skills
description: Agent skills for RISC OS development, build workflows, reverse engineering, and documentation.

interface.shortDescription: RISC OS development guidance and workflows
interface.longDescription: Adds RISC OS-focused skills for BBC BASIC, CMHG, AMU makefiles, StrongHelp, PRM-in-XML, module development, PyModules, command usage, output systems, and reverse engineering so Codex can follow the conventions and tooling used in RISC OS projects.
defaultPrompt: Use the RISC OS skills for this repository.
Help me fix this RISC OS module build.
Explain this BBC BASIC program using the available skills.
Guide me through a StrongHelp update.
